title: calonemorchis demissa
intro: Calonemorchis demissa, also known as the 'lost Calonemorchis', is a rare orchid species native to Australia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in treating respiratory issues due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Calonemorchis demissa include its potential to alleviate symptoms of bronchitis, asthma, and other respiratory conditions. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an infusion or tincture for medicinal use.
